penalties.description: No objects dropped outside field of view or requiring retrieval
All 6 pegs appear to be successfully placed on board positions

confidence_rationale: Video frames clearly show peg positions and transfers throughout task. All 6 pegs are visible on the board at completion. Completion time estimated from final frame where all pegs are seated. No dropped objects observed. Minor ambiguity in exact moment of task completion (final frame precision) reduces confidence slightly.
cannot_determine: Exact frame count at completion — video frames provided do not include timestamp overlay; estimate based on sequential frame position
technique_summary: Intermediate-level performance demonstrating solid bilateral coordination and efficient peg transfer technique. All pegs successfully transferred with no penalties. Time of 82.5 seconds places performance in intermediate range (60–120s benchmark).
strengths: Clean instrument exchanges between dominant and non-dominant hands
Smooth peg placement without overshooting or positioning errors
Efficient transition between forward and reverse phases
Steady hand control and coordinated bilateral movements
improvement_suggestions: Reduce overall time to 60–70s range to reach expert level performance
Increase speed of midair transfers while maintaining control
Optimize reverse phase timing — currently slightly slower than forward phase
